meaning: n.独身者,独身主义者adj.独身的,未婚的,禁欲的
examples: I was celibate for two years.
I've been celibate for the past six months.
The Pope bluntly told the world's priests yesterday to stay celibate.
But finding real-life priests who are willing to be celibate, let alone trendy, is another matter.
And he is now said to be celibate, that is fine, one takes that at face value.
